languages.text: {n}Люди, возникшие словно бы из ниоткуда, с опаской приближаются к вам. Все они покрыты шрамами и носят подобие униформы. У некоторых вы замечаете грубые протезы, вырезанные из дерева или кости. Их взгляды улавливают каждое ваше движение.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Люди, возникшие словно бы из ниоткуда, с опаской приближаются к вам. Все они покрыты шрамами и носят подобие униформы. У некоторых вы замечаете грубые протезы, вырезанные из дерева или кости. Их взгляды улавливают каждое ваше движение.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Люди, возникшие словно бы из ниоткуда, с опаской приближаются к вам. Все они покрыты шрамами и носят подобие униформы. У некоторых вы замечаете грубые протезы, вырезанные из дерева или кости. Их взгляды улавливают каждое ваше движение.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The people, who seemed to appear out of thin air, approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some semblance of a uniform, while you notice that a few in the group have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

{n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

{n}The people, who seemed to appear out of thin air, cautiously approach you. Their deliberately relaxed manner cannot mask the way they are observing you — with professional scrutiny. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some semblance of a uniform, while you notice that a few in the group have crude prostheses.{/n}

{n}The people, who seemed to appear out of thin air, approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some semblance of a uniform, while you notice that a few in the group have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

{n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

{n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

languages.text: {n}薄っすらと現れたかのような人々が、慎重に近づいてくる。わざと緩めた態度で、あなたをじっと見つめている。彼らの目は、プロの目線であなたを分析している。全員が傷跡を負い、何らかの制服を身につけている。その中には、粗末な義肢を身につけている者もいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The people, who seemed to appear out of thin air, cautiously approach you. Their deliberately relaxed manner cannot mask the way they are observing you — with professional scrutiny. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some semblance of a uniform, while you notice that a few in the group have crude prostheses.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İnsanlar, sanki havadan peydahlanmış gibi temkinlice sana yaklaşıyor. Her bir yara bere içinde ve bir tür üniforma giymiş, ayrıca bazılarının kemik ve ahşaptan yapılmış derme çatma protezleri olduğunu fark ediyorsun. Gözleri sana kilitlenmiş, her hareketini izliyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İnsanlar, sanki havadan peydahlanmış gibi temkinlice sana yaklaşıyor. Her bir yara bere içinde ve bir tür üniforma giymiş, ayrıca bazılarının kemik ve ahşaptan yapılmış derme çatma protezleri olduğunu fark ediyorsun. Gözleri sana kilitlenmiş, her hareketini izliyorlar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这些人仿佛凭空出现，正小心翼翼地靠近你。他们个个带伤，穿着某种类似制服的东西，你注意到其中几人装有用骨头和木头制成的粗糙义肢。他们的眼睛紧紧盯着你，注意着你的一举一动。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这些人仿佛凭空出现，正小心翼翼地靠近你。他们个个带伤，穿着某种类似制服的东西，你注意到其中几人装有用骨头和木头制成的粗糙义肢。他们的眼睛紧紧盯着你，注意着你的一举一动。{/n}

languages.text: {n}In diesem Moment tauchen scheinbar aus dem Nichts Leute auf, die sich dir vorsichtig nähern. Sie sind mit Narben übersät und tragen eine Art Uniform ... außerdem fällt dir auf, dass einige von ihnen einfache Prothesen aus Holz und Knochen haben. Sie richten ihre Blicke auf dich und verfolgen jede deiner Bewegungen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In diesem Moment tauchen scheinbar aus dem Nichts Leute auf, die sich dir vorsichtig nähern. Sie sind mit Narben übersät und tragen eine Art Uniform ... außerdem fällt dir auf, dass einige von ihnen einfache Prothesen aus Holz und Knochen haben. Sie richten ihre Blicke auf dich und verfolgen jede deiner Bewegungen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Comme surgis de nulle part, des hommes s'approchent de vous avec circonspection. Couturés de cicatrices, ils portent tous une sorte d'uniforme, et vous remarquez que certains sont équipés de prothèses de fortune fabriquées à partir d'os et de bois. Leurs yeux sont rivés sur vous, observant vos moindres faits et gestes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seeming to appear out of thin air, people approach you with caution. Every one of them is scarred and wearing some kind a uniform and you notice that a few have crude prostheses made of bone and wood. Their eyes are fixed on you, noting your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Comme surgis de nulle part, des hommes s'approchent de vous avec circonspection. Couturés de cicatrices, ils portent tous une sorte d'uniforme, et vous remarquez que certains sont équipés de prothèses de fortune fabriquées à partir d'os et de bois. Leurs yeux sont rivés sur vous, observant vos moindres faits et gestes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gente que parece salida de la nada se acerca a ti con cautela. Todos ellos cuentan con cicatrices y llevan algo que parece un uniforme. Algunos de ellos cuentan con prótesis toscas de hueso y madera. Sus ojos están fijos en ti, escudriñando cada movimiento.{/n}
